title: Restrict RDP firewall rule to IAP proxy range
rollback_instructions: Run: gcloud compute firewall-rules update default-allow-rdp --source-ranges=0.0.0.0/0 --project=local-pointer-489706-f8. Verify with: gcloud compute firewall-rules describe default-allow-rdp --project=local-pointer-489706-f8. Confirm source range is back to 0.0.0.0/0. Note: restoring open RDP is dangerous—only do this if there is a confirmed operational need and apply a narrower CIDR if possible.

title: Restrict SSH firewall rule to IAP proxy range
rollback_instructions: Run: gcloud compute firewall-rules update default-allow-ssh --source-ranges=0.0.0.0/0 --project=local-pointer-489706-f8. Verify with: gcloud compute firewall-rules describe default-allow-ssh --project=local-pointer-489706-f8. Confirm source range is back to 0.0.0.0/0. Warning: restoring open SSH is a security risk—if rollback is needed, prefer a specific CIDR (e.g., your office IP) rather than 0.0.0.0/0.
